# mgc_container_registry_scan_status (Data Source)

Returns the current status of a Container Registry image scan.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mgc_container_registry_scan_status" "scan_status" {
  scan_id = mgc_container_registry_scan.scan.id
}

output "scans_status" {
  value = data.mgc_container_registry_scan_status.scan_status
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `scan_id` (String) ID of the scan to inspect

### Read-Only

- `architecture` (String) Architecture of the scanned image
- `child_scans` (Attributes List) Per-architecture child scans (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--child_scans))
- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the scan was scheduled
- `digest` (String) Digest of the scanned image
- `finished_at` (String) Timestamp when the scan finished
- `input_tag` (String) Tag used when the scan was scheduled
- `os` (String) Operating system of the scanned image
- `severity_summary` (Object) Vulnerability counts grouped by severity (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--severity_summary))
- `status` (String) Current status of the scan
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp when the scan was last updated

<a id="nestedatt--child_scans"></a>
### Nested Schema for `child_scans`

Read-Only:

- `architecture` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `digest` (String)
- `finished_at` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `input_tag` (String)
- `os` (String)
- `severity_summary` (Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--child_scans--severity_summary))
- `status` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--child_scans--severity_summary"></a>
### Nested Schema for `child_scans.severity_summary`

Read-Only:

- `critical` (Number)
- `fixable` (Number)
- `high` (Number)
- `low` (Number)
- `medium` (Number)
- `total` (Number)



<a id="nestedatt--severity_summary"></a>
### Nested Schema for `severity_summary`

Read-Only:

- `critical` (Number)
- `fixable` (Number)
- `high` (Number)
- `low` (Number)
- `medium` (Number)
- `total` (Number)
